parameters.apprise_url_plus: dapnet://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.user_secret }} }:${ customer_secrets.{{ params.password_secret }} }@${ customer_secrets.{{ params.targets_secret }} }
parameters.description: Send notifications to your own DAPNET destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise dapnet:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway/gateway-plus channels transform the envelope directly into a DAPNET calls API JSON body and post it to hampager.de (no Apprise).
parameters.gateway_body_template: {"text":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and ": " or "")..(_body.body or "")) *},"callSignNames":["${ customer_secrets.DAPNET_CALLSIGN }"],"transmitterGroupNames":["${ customer_secrets.DAPNET_TRANSMITTER_GROUP }"],"emergency":false}
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to DAPNET calls API (no Apprise)
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment DAPNET destinations, direct

password_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's DAPNET password

targets_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's DAPNET targets

user_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's DAPNET user
